header.description: Submit a request for certified letters, older statements, management confirmations, or archived building records.

options.label: Account Statement
options.description: Maintenance and sinking fund statement for a selected period.

options.label: Residency Confirmation Letter
options.description: Official management letter confirming your current address.

options.label: Access or Visitor Record
options.description: Building entry log or visitor history confirmation.

options.label: Archived Circular or Notice
options.description: Older circulars, notices, and building memos not listed in the app.

purposeField.label: Purpose
purposeField.placeholder: Tell us what the document is needed for

options.label: Digital PDF
options.description: Delivered to your in-app account or registered email.

options.label: Printed Copy
options.description: Prepared for collection at the management office.

notesField.label: Notes
notesField.placeholder: Add dates, reference numbers, or any details that help us locate the document

uploadField.label: Supporting files
uploadField.title: Attach supporting proof
uploadField.description: Upload a form, ID, or reference screenshot if the management office needs supporting context.

timelineCard.title: Typical turnaround within 1 to 3 working days
timelineCard.description: Certified or archived requests may take longer if manual retrieval or approval is required.

cta.helperText: Management will review your request and contact you if more details are needed.

messages.errorDescription: The mocked document request form could not be loaded.
messages.successDescription: Your document request has been logged. A confirmation will appear once the management team starts processing it.
